name: Beerakaya Kura

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup milk or 2 tbsp grated coconut

steps: Crackle mustard and cumin in oil, then saute onion, green chillies and curry leaves.
Add tomato and turmeric and cook until soft.
Add the ridge gourd cubes and salt, cover and cook — the gourd releases its own sweet water.
When tender, stir in milk or coconut and simmer two minutes for a silky gravy.
Serve with rice or hot chapatis.
